qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in science with one-year experience in health-related research project & BSc Nursing OR Post-graduation degree in life science/ Biological science (MSc, MPH, MSc Nursing etc.)
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Essential: 1. Graduate in science with one-year experience in health-related research project & BSc Nursing OR Post-graduation degree in life science/ Biological science (MSc, MPH, MSc Nursing etc.). Desirable: 1. Experience in data collection and compilation. 2. Writing Skills (Manuscript/Scientific write up).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Rishikesh Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Graduate degree in science with one year of experience in a health-related research project and BSc Nursing, or a Post-graduation degree in life science/biological science (MSc, MPH, MSc Nursing, etc.).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Assistant post is 35 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month for the Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Exam followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the post.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Research Assistant position is on a contract basis.
